## Card Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx

    <CardHeader actions={...} hasWrap={...} id={...} isToggleRightAligned={...} onExpand={...} selectableActions={...} toggleButtonProps={...}>
      <CardTitle component={...} />
      <CardBody component={...} isFilled={...} />
      <CardFooter component={...} />
    </CardHeader>
    <CardTitle component={...} />
    <CardBody component={...} isFilled={...} />
    <CardFooter component={...} />
    <CardExpandableContent />
  </Card>
```

### Fix 3
Line: 373
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: div

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  372        {showButton && (
  373          <Button
  374            aria-label={title}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/monitoring-plugin/source/web/src/components/dashboards/legacy/legacy-dashboard.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze each fix:

### Fix 1 Analysis (Line 379 - Button variant="plain")
The type changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`. The only change is the addition of `'stateful'`. The value `"plain"` is still valid in the new type. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 2 Analysis (Line 282 - Card family conformance)
Looking at the incidents:
- Line 282: `CardHeader` must be inside `Card` (aliased as `PFCard`). Looking at lines 277-299, `CardHeader` IS inside `PFCard`. ✓ Already correct.
- Line 300: `CardBody` must be inside `Card` or `CardHeader`. Looking at lines 300-356, `CardBody` IS inside `PFCard`. ✓ Already correct.

The Card family structure already conforms to v6 composition. The `PFCard` alias maps to `Card`. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 3 Analysis (Line 373 - Icon children to prop on Button)
Lines 373-383 show:
```tsx
<Button
  aria-label={title}
  className="pf-v5-m-link--align-left"
  onClick={toggleIsExpanded}
  style={{ fontSize: 24 }}
  title={title}
  variant="plain"
>
  <Icon />
   {row.title}
</Button>
```

This Button contains an icon (`<Icon />`) AND text (` {row.title}`). Per the fix instructions: "If `<Button>` contains an icon AND text, move just the icon." However, `Icon` here is a locally-defined variable (`const Icon = isExpanded ? AngleDownIcon : AngleRightIcon;`) — it's from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The fix says to move the icon to the `icon` prop.

The result should be:
```tsx
<Button
  aria-label={title}
  className="pf-v5-m-link--align-left"
  onClick={toggleIsExpanded}
  style={{ fontSize: 24 }}
  title={title}
  variant="plain"
  icon={<Icon />}
>
   {row.title}
</Button>
```

Now let me apply the changes:

arguments.after:
<Button
          aria-label={title}
          className="pf-v5-m-link--align-left"
          onClick={toggleIsExpanded}
          style={{ fontSize: 24 }}
          title={title}
          variant="plain"
          icon={<Icon />}
        >
           {row.title}
        </Button>
arguments.before:
<Button
          aria-label={title}
          className="pf-v5-m-link--align-left"
          onClick={toggleIsExpanded}
          style={{ fontSize: 24 }}
          title={title}
          variant="plain"
        >
          <Icon />
           {row.title}
        </Button>

content.text: Let me verify the final result:

The edit was applied correctly. The `<Icon />` has been moved from children to the `icon` prop, and the text content ` {row.title}` remains as children.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Line 379)
**Already correct — no change needed.** The `variant="plain"` value is still valid in the new type. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Card family conformance (Lines 282, 300)
**Already correct — no change needed.** Both `CardHeader` (line 282) and `CardBody` (line 300) are already correctly nested inside `PFCard` (which is aliased from `Card`), conforming to the v6 composition structure. No removed props (`hasSelectableInput`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`, etc.) are used on the `PFCard` component.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button (Line 373)
**Applied.** The `<Icon />` element (from `@patternfly/react-icons` — dynamically assigned as `AngleDownIcon` or `AngleRightIcon`) was moved from Button's children to the `icon` prop. The text content (` {row.title}`) remains as children, following the "icon AND text" migration pattern. No imports needed to change since `Icon` is a local variable referencing already-imported icon components.

The edit was applied correctly. The `<Icon />` has been moved from children to the `icon` prop, and the text content ` {row.title}` remains as children.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Line 379)
**Already correct — no change needed.** The `variant="plain"` value is still valid in the new type. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Card family conformance (Lines 282, 300)
**Already correct — no change needed.** Both `CardHeader` (line 282) and `CardBody` (line 300) are already correctly nested inside `PFCard` (which is aliased from `Card`), conforming to the v6 composition structure. No removed props (`hasSelectableInput`, `isFlat`, `isRounded`, etc.) are used on the `PFCard` component.

### Fix 3 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button (Line 373)
**Applied.** The `<Icon />` element (from `@patternfly/react-icons` — dynamically assigned as `AngleDownIcon` or `AngleRightIcon`) was moved from Button's children to the `icon` prop. The text content (` {row.title}`) remains as children, following the "icon AND text" migration pattern. No imports needed to change since `Icon` is a local variable referencing already-imported icon components.
